scripts.test-parser: node -e "const p = require('./src/modules/parsers'); p.testSingle('sony', 'TR').then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)))"
scripts.test-sony-detail: node -e "const s = require('./src/modules/parsers/sony'); s.fetchDeals('TR').then(r => { console.log('Игр:', r.length); const fc = r.find(g => g.name.toLowerCase().includes('fc 26') || g.name.toLowerCase().includes('fc26')); if(fc) { console.log('=== FC26 ==='); console.log('bestPrice:', JSON.stringify(fc.bestPrice, null, 2)); console.log('Издания:'); fc.prices.TR.editions.forEach(e => console.log(' ', e.name, '| base:', e.basePrice, '| sale:', e.salePrice, '| plus:', e.plusPrice, '| discount:', e.discountPct+'%%')); } else { console.log('FC26 не найден, первая игра:', r[0]?.name); } })"
scripts.test-parser-all: node -e "const p = require('./src/modules/parsers'); p.runFullParse().then(r => console.log('Готово:', r.summary))"
scripts.test-pricing: node -e "const p = require('./src/modules/pricing'); const tests = [[2999, 'TR'], [5490, 'TR'], [259, 'TR'], [1499, 'UA'], [699, 'UA']]; tests.forEach(([price, region]) => { const r = p.calculatePrice(price, region); console.log(region + ' ' + price + ' → ' + r.clientPrice + '₽ (маржа ' + r.marginPct.toFixed(1) + '%%, коэфф ' + r.coefficient.toFixed(2) + ')'); });"
